The team will commence the week with a collaborative planning session to define the scope of the new app feature. A dedicated collaborative brainstorming session will be scheduled on Monday morning to align on technical requirements. This initial phase ensures that all stakeholders are prepared for the upcoming development cycle.

Coding activities will dominate Tuesday through Thursday, with daily stand-ups to track progress. The team must update the project management board after each completed task to maintain transparency. Testing protocols will be implemented on Friday to identify any critical bugs before deployment. Please refer to [Software Development Life Cycle Best Practices](https://www.agilealliance.org/glossary/sdlc) for further guidance on our methodology. Finally, the week concludes with a review meeting to discuss lessons learned and plan the next iteration.
